case_title: ALISON GILMORE VS. WALTER EARL HOLMAN et al

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION AND RESPONSE TO DEFT'S MOTION TO STRIKE; MEMO OF P&A; ATTACHMENT AND EXHIBITS, AND [PROPOSED] ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILMORE, ALISON

NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF GHIGLIOTTI, JR., JEROME J. ON JAN-14-2010 THROUGH JAN-14-2010 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILMORE, ALISON
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT HOLMAN, WALTER EARL HEARING SET FOR MAR-11-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILMORE, ALISON AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMAN, WALTER EARL

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT WALTER HOLMAN'S RE-NOTICE OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S HAVING FILED AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT WALTER HOLMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS CONCERNING THE 3 DAY NOTICE BECAUSE THOSE ALLEGATIONS ARE SUPPLEMENTAL AND GOVERNED BY CCP 464, WHICH REQUIRES LEAVE OF COURT, RATHER THAN BY CCP 472. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT WALTER EARL HOLMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED UNLAWFUL DETAINER COMPLAINT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PREJUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILMORE, ALISON SERVED JAN-25-2010, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20
LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT WALTER HOLMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS RENOTICED FOR MARCH 15, 2010 AS THE AMENDED NOTICE WAS FILED ON FEBRUARY 11, 2010.
OPPOSITION AND RESPONSE TO DEFT'S DEMURRER; MEMO OF P&A; ATTACHMENTS AND EXHIBITS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILMORE, ALISON

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT WALTER HOLMAN'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE NOTICES ARE DEFECTIVE AT LEAST IN THAT THEY DO NOT SPECIFY ANY DATE FOR TERMINATION OR CURE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
ORDER : THE PETITION TO TRANSFER AND REQUEST TO CONSOLIDATE ARE DENIED(128285 #2)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GILMORE, ALISON TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT HOLMAN, WALTER EARL DEFENDANT REMAINS IN LAWFUL POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
